_schema_note: Append-only. A decision's identity is the (category, subject) pair; to change a decision, APPEND a new entry with the identical category+subject and move the old choice into options_considered with rejected_because explaining the change. Never edit or delete old entries.

decisions.subject: Production pipeline
decisions.selected: Local Kokoro TTS + HyperFrames HTML/GSAP render + Homebrew FFmpeg 8.1.2 (libx264 present, doctor-verified)
options_considered: Source-built FFmpeg in ~/ffbuild per skill default
decisions.rejected_because: A source build adds ~10 min for zero capability gain; Homebrew build already passes the libx264 encoder check and HyperFrames doctor.

decisions.subject: Explainer shape
decisions.rejected_because: The source is an architecture document with no product UI; the deliverable is understanding a pipeline, which is diagram-led by nature.
decisions.approved_by: user brief (create an explainer video based on the architecture md)

decisions.subject: Narration voice
decisions.rejected_because: Skill default; weights already cached locally; neutral clear delivery suits a technical explainer.

decisions.subject: Background music
decisions.selected: Deterministic synthesized sine pad (A2+E3+A3, lowpass 1400 Hz) at data-volume 0.11 on track 8
decisions.rejected_because: Narration-only reads dry over 70 s of abstract infrastructure diagrams; a low bed adds continuity without competing with speech.

decisions.subject: Master output
decisions.selected: 1920x1080 @ 30 fps, H.264 + AAC, HyperFrames --quality high, ~65-70 s
decisions.rejected_because: Diagram-and-text content targets desktop/Teams viewing; 1080p is the skill default and renders fast.

decisions.subject: Scene 5/7 persistence depiction
decisions.selected: v2: enricher produces enriched flows to the deltav-flows Kafka topic; ClickHouse ingests with its own Kafka consumer; recap spur Kafka->telemetryd removed
options_considered: v2: SCS processor -> deltav-flows topic -> ClickHouse Kafka consumer
v1: enricher writes flow documents directly to ClickHouse
decisions.rejected_because: SME feedback (SME, 2026-07-18): the doc's 'writes to deltav-flows (ClickHouse ingestion)' wording and mermaid edge read as a direct write, but deltav-flows is a Kafka topic and ClickHouse consumes it itself. Scene 6 partition claim left unchanged pending the SME's confirmation (his note conflicts with the doc's Scaling-ceilings section).
decisions.approved_by: user (relayed SME feedback and requested v2)

decisions.subject: Approval gates
decisions.selected: Autonomous run: script self-locked, validation ladder + snapshot review + post-render self-review as gates; user reviews the finished master
options_considered: pause for user approval at script lock
decisions.rejected_because: Session is autonomous (user not watching live); the source doc fully determines the content, so script-lock approval would only block progress.
